opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I've been pinching my nose for almost an hour, but the blood just keeps pouring down the back of my throat and making me sick.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Prolonged, heavy nosebleed unresponsive to first aid, with swallowed blood causing vomiting.

symptom_narrative.character: profuse bleeding from the nose with blood running down the throat
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: nose, with blood down the throat
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: swallowing blood makes him feel sick
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: vomited once from swallowed blood, coughing up clots, feeling increasingly lightheaded
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: sitting forward holding a blood-soaked towel to his face

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants the bleeding to stop and is worried about how much blood he's lost

access_barriers.transport: spouse available to drive but patient feels faint
